OUR STORY

ABOUT ILTMC

A brotherhood forged on the open road, united by the love of motorcycles and the spirit of adventure.

INTREPIDUS LEONES - The Fearless Lions

Founded in 2013 in Agartala, Tripura, ILTMC (Intrepidus Leones Tripura Motorcycle Club) represents a brotherhood of passionate riders who share an unbreakable bond through their love for motorcycles and the open road.

Our name, derived from Latin, means "Fearless Lions" - embodying the courage, strength, and pride that defines every member of our club. We ride together, stand together, and grow together.

Brotherhood

Freedom

Respect

2013

Foundation

ILTMC was founded by passionate riders in Tripura

2015

First State Ride

Organized first statewide motorcycle rally

2018

National Recognition

Joined the national motorcycle club federation

2020

Community Service

Started charity rides and community programs

2023

10 Year Anniversary

Celebrated a decade of brotherhood and riding
